title: Material Passport
description: Cross-stage state handoff object for paper.skill autonomous mode. Carries research metadata between M0–M7 modules so sessions can resume after context resets. Simplified from ARS Schema 9 — focused on fields the autonomous workflow actually needs.

passport_id.description: Unique identifier for this passport instance (UUID or content hash).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the passport was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification.

schema_version.description: Schema version string, e.g. "0.1". Increment when fields change.

current_stage.description: Current pipeline stage. Modules read this to know where to resume.

research_question.description: The primary research question driving the paper.

methodology.description: Free-form methodology description. Shape is intentionally open for now.

description.description: Narrative description of the research methodology.

data_source.description: Primary data source(s) for the research.

bibliography.description: List of cited works with verification metadata for anti-hallucination tracking.

s2_id.description: Semantic Scholar paper ID, if available.

verification_status.description: Result of Tier 0/1/2 verification. unverified = not yet checked; verified = S2 API confirmed; doi_mismatch = DOI reverse-lookup failed; s2_not_found = S2 has no match; fabricated = total fabrication (TF).

outline.description: Paper outline: chapter keys map to arrays of section objects. Free-form for now.

corpus.description: Paths to local evidence files under relate-work/.

material_gaps.description: Anti-leakage tracking: locations where no evidence was found and a [MATERIAL GAP] marker was placed.

location.description: File and line or section where the gap was detected.

description.description: What claim or data point lacks evidence.

status.description: open = gap still unfilled; resolved = evidence found; accepted = gap acknowledged as unavoidable.

argument_audit.description: Devil's Advocate audit trail: each core claim must have DA attacks and rebuttal scores.

claim_text.description: The text of the claim being audited.

da_attacks.description: Devil's Advocate counter-arguments against this claim.

rebuttal_score.description: Rebuttal strength 1-5. Concession only allowed when score >= 4.

frame_lock_detected.description: True if AI appears to be self-consolidating rather than genuinely reflecting.

reset_boundary.description: Checkpoint for session-reset recovery. Records a hash and the stage at which the passport was snapshotted.

hash.description: Content hash of the passport at checkpoint time.

stage_when_emitted.description: Pipeline stage when this checkpoint was created.

can_resume_from.description: The stage from which a new session should resume.
